option.name: originalContent
option.value:
services:
user_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: user_db_salon_booking ports: - "5432:5432" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 10s volumes: - user-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: user_db_salon_booking networks: - vmt1609
booking_service_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: booking_service_db_salon_booking ports: - "5433:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: booking_service_db_salon_booking volumes: - booking-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 networks: - vmt1609
category_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: category_db_salon_booking ports: - "5434:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: category_db_salon_booking volumes: - category-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
payment_service_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: payment_service_db_salon_booking ports: - "5435:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: payment_service_db_salon_booking volumes: - payment-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
salon_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: salon_db_salon_booking ports: - "5436:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: salon_db_salon_booking volumes: - salon-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
service_offer_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: service_offer_db_salon_booking ports: - "5437:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: service_offer_db_salon_booking volumes: - service-offer-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
rabbitmq: image: rabbitmq:3.13-management container_name: rabbitmq ports: - "5672:5672" - "15672:15672" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "rabbitmq-diagnostics -q ping" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 10s environment: RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: guest RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: guest volumes: - rabbitmq-data:/var/lib/rabbitmq networks: - vmt1609
eurekaserver: image: "vmt1609/salon-eureka-server:v1" ports: - "9999:9999" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:9999/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 30s container_name: eurekaserver
deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
user: image: "vmt1609/salon-user-service:v1" ports: - "8080:8080" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8080/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: user depends_on: user_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "user-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://user_db_salon_booking:5432/user_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
booking: image: "vmt1609/salon-booking-service:v1" ports: - "8084:8084" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8084/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: booking depends_on: booking_service_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "booking-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://booking_service_db_salon_booking:5432/booking_service_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
category: image: "vmt1609/salon-category-service:v1" ports: - "8082:8082" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8082/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: category depends_on: category_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "category-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://category_db_salon_booking:5432/category_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
payment: image: "vmt1609/salon-payment-service:v1" ports: - "8085:8085" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8085/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: payment depends_on: payment_service_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "payment-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://payment_service_db_salon_booking:5432/payment_service_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
salon: image: "vmt1609/salon-service:v1" ports: - "8081:8081" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8081/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: salon depends_on: salon_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "salon-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://salon_db_salon_booking:5432/salon_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
service_offering: image: "vmt1609/salon-service-offering:v1" ports: - "8083:8083" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8083/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: service_offering depends_on: service_offer_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "service-offering" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://service_offer_db_salon_booking:5432/service_offer_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
gatewayservice: image: "vmt1609/salon-gateway-service:v1" ports: - "8888:8888" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8888/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: gatewayservice environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "gateway-service" EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
networks: vmt1609: driver: "bridge"
volumes: user-data: booking-data: category-data: payment-data: salon-data: service-offer-data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services:
user_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: user_db_salon_booking ports: - "5432:5432" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 10s volumes: - user-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: user_db_salon_booking networks: - vmt1609
booking_service_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: booking_service_db_salon_booking ports: - "5433:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: booking_service_db_salon_booking volumes: - booking-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 networks: - vmt1609
category_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: category_db_salon_booking ports: - "5434:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: category_db_salon_booking volumes: - category-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
payment_service_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: payment_service_db_salon_booking ports: - "5435:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: payment_service_db_salon_booking volumes: - payment-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
salon_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: salon_db_salon_booking ports: - "5436:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: salon_db_salon_booking volumes: - salon-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
service_offer_db_salon_booking: image: postgres:16 container_name: service_offer_db_salon_booking ports: - "5437:5432" environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 123456 POSTGRES_DB: service_offer_db_salon_booking volumes: - service-offer-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres" ] networks: - vmt1609
rabbitmq: image: rabbitmq:3.13-management container_name: rabbitmq ports: - "5672:5672" - "15672:15672" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "rabbitmq-diagnostics -q ping" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 10s environment: RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: guest RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: guest volumes: - rabbitmq-data:/var/lib/rabbitmq networks: - vmt1609
eurekaserver: image: "vmt1609/salon-eureka-server:v1" ports: - "9999:9999" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:9999/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 30s container_name: eurekaserver
deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
user: image: "vmt1609/salon-user-service:v1" ports: - "8080:8080" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8080/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: user depends_on: user_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "user-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://user_db_salon_booking:5432/user_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
booking: image: "vmt1609/salon-booking-service:v1" ports: - "8084:8084" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8084/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: booking depends_on: booking_service_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "booking-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://booking_service_db_salon_booking:5432/booking_service_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
category: image: "vmt1609/salon-category-service:v1" ports: - "8082:8082" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8082/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: category depends_on: category_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "category-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://category_db_salon_booking:5432/category_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
payment: image: "vmt1609/salon-payment-service:v1" ports: - "8085:8085" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8085/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: payment depends_on: payment_service_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "payment-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://payment_service_db_salon_booking:5432/payment_service_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
salon: image: "vmt1609/salon-service:v1" ports: - "8081:8081" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8081/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: salon depends_on: salon_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "salon-service" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://salon_db_salon_booking:5432/salon_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
service_offering: image: "vmt1609/salon-service-offering:v1" ports: - "8083:8083" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8083/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: service_offering depends_on: service_offer_db_salon_booking: condition: service_healthy eurekaserver: condition: service_healthy environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "service-offering" SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://service_offer_db_salon_booking:5432/service_offer_db_salon_booking" SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 123456 EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
gatewayservice: image: "vmt1609/salon-gateway-service:v1" ports: - "8888:8888" healthcheck: test: [ "CMD-SHELL", "curl --fail --silent localhost:8888/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1" ] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 10 start_period: 20s container_name: gatewayservice environment: SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME: "gateway-service" EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eurekaserver:9999/eureka/ deploy: resources: limits: memory: 700m networks: - vmt1609
networks: vmt1609: driver: "bridge"
volumes: user-data: booking-data: category-data: payment-data: salon-data: service-offer-data: rabbitmq-data:

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
